title: Simulated Extra
description: Very small addon for Simulated/Offroad that adds centered versions of the wheel mounts
body:
Very small addon for Create: Aeronautics/Offroad. Adds a centered version of the wheel mount. Unlike the normal one, it can NOT turn. And named throtthle levers. (Use a name tag)
![Photo showing the centered wheel mounts with 3 different wheels](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9d9d9a7258b7629332bbc410553891bdc301f55.png)
![Photo showing 3 flywheels](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45022183a50cb0afc15a631c4874a2113357db86.png)
